issues.description: Card has protective effect text but effects array is empty. Must define Counter trigger with condition for Slash attribute Character cost ≤5, action to Rest this Character, and prevent KO.

suggestedDsl.effectText: If your <Slash> attribute Character with a cost of 5 or less other than this Character would be K.O.'d by your opponent's effect, you may rest this Character instead.

effects.note: Prevents KO of target Slash Character
